item.title: spitr 0.5.2
item.description:
fix(ci): sign CI builds with spitr-dev, not ad-hoc
A self-signed cert imported into a fresh CI keychain isn't trusted, so bundle.sh's `find-identity -v` (valid-only) couldn't see it and silently fell back to ad-hoc — which Sparkle rejects on update and which breaks TCC permission continuity. Fixes: - bundle.sh honors a SIGN_IDENTITY override (CI sets it to spitr-dev), bypassing the validity check, and asserts the result is actually signed by that identity — failing loudly instead of shipping ad-hoc. The assert captures codesign output before matching to avoid a pipefail/grep -q SIGPIPE race. - workflow sets SIGN_IDENTITY=spitr-dev and best-effort-trusts the cert.
Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

item.title: spitr 0.5.0
item.description: Auto-updates (Sparkle), in-app Settings, transcript history, frosted-glass HUD with hands-free dictation and TTS controls, and stability fixes.
